title: LifeOS Project Manifest
description: Machine-readable project manifest. Pair with the human-readable AMENDMENT_XX_NAME.md. Used by verify-project.mjs, CI, and the C&C dashboard.

project_id.description: Unique snake_case identifier. Matches the slug column in the projects DB table.

amendment_path.description: Relative path from repo root to the amendment markdown file.

lifecycle.description: experimental=in active development, production=live and stable, deprecated=being phased out

owner.description: Who owns this project. 'adam' for user-owned, team name for shared.

phase.description: Current phase of the project (free text, e.g. 'stabilization', 'mvp', 'polish').

next_task.description: Exactly one current next task. Everything else is pending. If blocked, prefix with [BLOCKED]: reason.

stability_class.description: How cautiously AI should approach this project right now.

current_focus.description: One-liner of what is actively being worked on. Shown in C&C hover tooltip.

required_files.description: Files that must exist for this project to be considered intact.

protected_files.description: Files this project may read but must not casually rewrite. Requires explicit review.

owned_files.description: Files this project exclusively owns. Other projects must not touch them.

required_routes.description: HTTP routes that must exist and return expected status codes.

required_env.description: Environment variables that must be present for this project to function.

assertions.description: Additional executable assertions beyond the standard checks.

completion_checks.description: Human-readable criteria that define when this project is complete.

last_verified_at.description: ISO timestamp of last successful verifier run. Written by verify-project.mjs.

verification_passed.description: Result of last verifier run. Written by verify-project.mjs.

anti_drift_notes.description: Free text notes for AI sessions — things that look wrong but are intentional.

decision_debt.description: Shortcuts taken deliberately that must be resolved before production.
